impacts.statement: Extensive lowland flooding of farms, roads, rivers and creeks up to several miles from the river channel begins.
Flooding of some fishing camps as well as a few secondary roads will occur at these stages.
Cobb Landing boat launch begins to flood.
Millers Ferry Park begins to flood.
Farm and pasturelands in the area will flood and cattle should be moved to higher ground.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 48 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
